positive: A celestial, minimalist landscape featuring stylized constellations and glowing cosmic flora floating around a central, abstract geometric mountain range. The style should be modern vector art infused with bioluminescence and deep indigo and gold accents. Focus on clean silhouettes, sharp edges, and high contrast against a deep midnight blue background. The composition must be perfectly centered and scalable for textile printing, utilizing negative space effectively. Volumetric lighting, ethereal glow, perfect symmetry, suitable for a t-shirt print.
negative: blur, artifacts, grainy, text, watermark, logo, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, noise, grayscale, realistic photography, muddy colors, clutter, messy background
